text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I stretch for five minutes, then drink a glass of water and make my bed. After a quick shower, I eat a simple breakfast of oatmeal and fruit. My work starts at 9:00 AM, and I usually have lunch around noon. In the afternoon, I take a short break to go for a 20-minute walk. After work, I exercise at home—either yoga or a short run. Evenings are for relaxing: I cook dinner, read a book, or call a friend. I try to be in bed by 10:30 PM. This routine helps me feel consistent and balanced every day.
